title: 『一流ウマ娘、キングヘイロー』

text_block_list.name: Program Narrator
text_block_list.text:
The first three years are said to be pivotal in
every Umamusume's career, and King Halo has
just put those three years to rest.

text_block_list.name: Program Narrator
text_block_list.text:
This program will cover her journey through and
beyond her sudden change of course which
shocked the world and brought her to where she
is now.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...Hmm. I suppose I'm not having a bad time right
now.

text_block_list.name: Program Narrator
text_block_list.text: Not, er, bad, you say?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ah, the close coverage on my career starts today,
doesn't it?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Excuse what I said. Anyway... did you have any
questions?

text_block_list.name: Program Narrator
text_block_list.text:
I'm actually somewhat curious as to why you'd
describe now as "not a bad time" instead of a
"good time."

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ah, is that so? Well, I don't mind enlightening
you.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
"Good" is a word you say when you feel satisfied,
correct? Considering that, I find "not bad" to be a
more apt choice.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
As a first-rate Umamusume, I cannot be content
with my current level of achievements.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
With that said, I actually have a meeting with my
trainer now. We can continue this another time.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! Pick up the pace! We must leave in style, just
like we practiced!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Keep your back straight! Get a hold of yourself already!
The cameras are still on us!

text_block_list.name: Program Narrator
text_block_list.text: And then, King Halo and her trainer left.

text_block_list.name: Program Narrator
text_block_list.text:
The next day, we visited King Halo on the track
before a race.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hello. I see you've come today as well. How
diligent.

text_block_list.name: Program Narrator
text_block_list.text: Well, there is a reason we call it close coverage.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. In that case, I'll grant you the right to
capture something special today.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
And by that, I mean the victory I'm about to
seize.

text_block_list.name: Program Narrator
text_block_list.text:
However, the race tragically ends with first place
seized by another.

text_block_list.name: Program Narrator
text_block_list.text: So...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
There's no need to be nervous. Don't you have a
job to do?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I may have not taken first place in today's race,
but it doesn't change who I am.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I graciously accept the outcome, no matter what
it may be. Experience provides the energy
needed to move forward.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: That is my ethos.

text_block_list.name: Program Narrator
text_block_list.text: You have a strong will.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Heh. Does that surprise you?

text_block_list.name: Program Narrator
text_block_list.text: Just where does that fighting spirit come from?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That's a good question, to which I have but one
thing I can say.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It matters not whether my competition is a genius
or a legend.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'll continue to be myself and follow my own path.
I am King Halo and I hold my head high with
pride.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
No matter the path I take, it will eventually lead
me to victory! The last laugh will be mine!

text_block_list.name: Program Narrator
text_block_list.text: King Halo marches forward without looking back.

text_block_list.name: Program Narrator
text_block_list.text:
Feast your eyes, for that is the departure of a
first-rate Umamusume whose glow gives light to
the Golden Generation.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Wasn't that great?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That was the best interview in the history of
interviews! Could I have been any more
charismatic?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Did you hear what they said? "A first-rate
Umamusume whose glow gives light to the
Golden Generation."

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I loved it! Hehe. ♪

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Don't you dare delete this video, Trainer! It must
be preserved in perpetuity!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clang.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
King, that was awesome! When did that interview
even happen?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: How is this possible?! I wanted to be the face of our generation!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. It was exactly what I expected from a
program covering King.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, totally. Her nagging at her trainer was so
true to life.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
What?! That's so far from what was remarkable
about the program! What about my—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And just like that, the room is suddenly filled with
lively voices.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To be honest, there's one other thing in particular
about the program that made me happy.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hm? What's that, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You were mumbling just now. If there's something
you want to say, then speak up.
choice_data_list: I thought it was a good program.
I thought it was a good program.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the program, they spoke of King Halo as a
racer, as an Umamusume—as herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There was no mention of "her mother's daughter"
at all, and they even went as far as to call her
"first-rate."

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, that's right. They showcased my talents
properly and thoroughly.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: The first-rate Umamusume, King Halo! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She shows me her large, trademark smile.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She most certainly is a first-rate Umamusume.
